Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Convertible Debentures (Ref: TSMNPI-000-FAKE)
Issuer: Siam GreenGrid Public Company Limited (PCL); Investor: Nimble Lotus Capital Co., Ltd.; Target: Delta Mangrove Energy Co., Ltd.
Summary: Proposed subscription of senior unsecured convertible debentures by the Investor and strategic acquisition of up to a minority stake in the Target, subject to approvals.
Regulatory/Disclosure: Transaction requires filings with the national securities regulator and disclosure via the domestic stock exchange news portal; no undisclosed material information is shared, and all references derive from the Issuer’s publicly released annual one-report filing.
Instrument/Pricing: Convertible debentures with conversion into ordinary shares post-approval; pricing and nominal value to be determined following regulator comments; no forward-looking guidance outside public domain.
Conditions Precedent: Board and shareholder approvals; acceptance of offering documents; execution of Data Processing Agreement (DPA) Schedule; completion of standard onboarding/KYC using generic forms.
PDPA/Privacy Controls: Data minimisation and retention schedule TH-RS-02 apply; no outstanding data subject access requests; previously logged erasure requests were completed and closed before this term sheet.
Intentional Positive — Cross-Border Transfer: Data Export Approval DEX-TH-112Z has been granted for transfer of limited HR onboarding data to LumenByte Services Pte. Ltd., Singapore, with contractual safeguards and encryption at rest and in transit.
Consent and Withdrawal: Consent withdrawal handling is set out in Onboarding Form TH-EMP-01; no current withdrawals affect the financing; contact via privacy@siamgreengrid.example (role mailbox).
MNPI Protocol: Clean team arrangements documented; insider list template appended; deal room excludes nonpublic performance metrics; references to “insider” and “material nonpublic” are policy terms and not indications of new information.
Reporting: Issuer to file Form TH-69-DEF and update free-float disclosures; timelines per applicable notifications; Target to furnish a public information pack containing only previously announced items from the prior quarter.
Covenants: No transfers of customer datasets outside Thailand except as covered by DEX-TH-112Z; retention checkpoints under TH-RS-02 are not yet due; audit logs recorded under placeholder IDs (e.g., LOG-00X).
Employment/Onboarding: HR onboarding forms use role mailboxes (hr@siamgreengrid.example) and exclude national ID numbers in diligence checklists; vendor access is read-only and time-limited.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Laws of Thailand; arbitration seated in Bangkok under institutional rules; bilingual execution permitted.
Annexes: DPA Schedule 2 (Processor List), Compliance Memo CM-TH-PP-04, Onboarding Forms TH-EMP-01/TH-INV-02, and Data Export Approval DEX-TH-112Z; all identifiers are placeholders and invalid by design.
